title: rubus deflectus
intro: Rubus deflectus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a type of shrub native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus deflectus include its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, which provide anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus deflectus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus deflectus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
